# comfyui_split_sigmas (Resource)

ComfyUI SplitSigmas node [sampling/custom_sampling/sigmas]



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `sigmas` (String) Input: SIGMAS (link)
- `step` (Number) Input: INT default: 0
